org.docgene.model

Class XMLInfobox

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLInfobox
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ParagraphElementParent, StyledElement

    public class XMLInfobox
extends java.lang.Object
implements ParagraphElementParent, StyledElement
    Represent an infobox implementation.

        public boolean hasProperty(java.lang.String key)
        Return true if the infobox has a property of a specified key.

        public XMLInfobox.Property getProperty(java.lang.String key)
        Return the property of a specified key.
        Parameters:
        key - the property key
        Returns:
        the property

      • hasCaption

        public boolean hasCaption()
        Return true if the infobox has a caption. There is a caption if there is a property with the PROPERTY_NAME key.
        Returns:
        true if the infobox has a caption

      • getCaption

        public java.lang.String getCaption()
        Return the infobox caption. The caption is the property of the PROPERTY_NAME key, if it exists.
        Returns:
        the infobox caption
